scripts.dev:cf: npm run build && npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed:local && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.db:migrate:preview: wrangler d1 migrations apply SimpleMealPlan-Preview --remote --env preview
scripts.db:seed:preview: wrangler d1 execute SimpleMealPlan-Preview --remote --env preview --file db/seed.sql
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name simple-meal-plan --branch preview
